name: Easy Oat Bran & Date Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped nuts, coconut, chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream the margarine and brown sugar together until well combined.
2. Beat in the egg and water, mixing thoroughly.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (whole-wheat flour, oat bran, wheat germ, baking soda, and baking powder), stirring until just mixed.
4. Stir in the chopped dates or raisins, nuts, coconut, chocolate chips, or other desired toppings.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto a lightly greased baking sheet, flattening slightly with a floured fork.
6. Bake in a 350°F (175°C) oven for 10 minutes, or until light golden brown.
7. Allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheets for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
